title: Notification No.16/2014-Cus(NT), dated 7.3.2014
text: [To be published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (ii)] Government of India Ministry of Finance (Department of Revenue) Notification No. 16/2014-Customs (N.T.) New Delhi, dated the 07th March, 2014 S.O. (E). - In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section 4 and sub- section (1) of section 5 of the Customs Act, 1962 (52 of 1962), the Central Board of Excise and Customs hereby appoints the Additional/Joint Commissioner of Customs, Central Excise and Service Tax, CGO Complex-II, Kamla Nagar, Ghaziabad-201002 to act as the Common Adjudicating Authority to exercise the powers and discharge the duties conferred or imposed on- (i) the Additional/Joint Commissioner of Customs, ICD, Tughlakabad, New Delhi; (ii) the Deputy/Assistant Commissioner of Customs, (I and G) New Custom House, Near IGI Airport, New Delhi ; and (iii) the Additional/Joint Commissioner of Customs, Central Excise and Service Tax, CGO Complex-II, Kamla Nagar, Ghaziabad-201002, for the purpose of adjudicating the matters relating to show cause notice pertaining to M/s K.S.Worth International, RZ-398-B/21, Tughlakabad Extension, New Delhi -110019 and others issued vide DRI F.No.23/90/2009-DZU/1596-1607 dated the 10th April, 2012 by the Additional Director, Directorate of Revenue Intelligence, Delhi Zonal Unit, New Delhi. [F.No. 437/03/2014-Cus.IV] (R.P.Singh) Director (Customs) -- 1 of 1 --
